headline: Integrated Quantum Technologies Provides Shareholder Update and Announces Corporate Name Change
summary: Key HighlightsAdvanced flagship product VEIL™ from research to enterprise commercialization, including the launch of the VEIL™ Snowflake Native Application.Achieved key independent validation milestones, including publication of the Company's technical white paper, which was endorsed by Dr. Mohammad Tayebi at Simon Fraser University, a third-party assessment by Forward Security, and the completion of the Pierce the VEIL™ Kaggle Challenge.Expanded the Company's enterprise AI infrastructure...
